PARAM.name: queue
PARAM.content: the queue to make unmodifiable, must not be null

PARAM.description: <E> must be a valid type for the elements in the queue
PARAM.name: <E>
PARAM.content: the type of the elements in the queue

RETURN.description: an unmodifiable queue backed by that queue
RETURN.content: an unmodifiable queue backed by that queue

PARAM.name: <E>
PARAM.content: the type of the elements in the queue
PARAM.description: the type of the elements in the queue

PARAM.name: queue
PARAM.content: the queue to predicate, must not be null
PARAM.description: the queue to predicate, must not be null

PARAM.name: predicate
PARAM.content: the predicate used to evaluate new elements, must not be null
PARAM.description: the predicate used to evaluate new elements, must not be null

RETURN.description: a predicated (validating) queue backed by the given queue.
RETURN.content: a predicated (validating) queue backed by the given queue.

THROWS.description: the queue or predicate is null
THROWS.name: NullPointerException
THROWS.content: if the queue or predicate is null

PARAM.name: <E>
PARAM.content: the type of the elements in the queue
PARAM.description: the type of the elements in the queue

PARAM.name: queue
PARAM.content: the queue to predicate, must not be null
PARAM.description: the queue to predicate, must not be null

PARAM.name: transformer
PARAM.content: the transformer for the queue, must not be null
PARAM.description: the transformer for the queue, must not be null

RETURN.description: Returns a transformed queue backed by the given queue.
RETURN.content: Returns a transformed queue backed by the given queue.

THROWS.description: if the queue or transformer is null.
THROWS.name: NullPointerException
THROWS.content: if the queue or transformer is null
